verification_command passed: cd cli && go build ./... && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/server/graphql/... -run 'TestHub_UsesProvidedFactory|TestIntegration_Subscription_BeadLifecycle'
rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go build ./... && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/server/graphql/... -run 'TestHub_UsesProvidedFactory|TestIntegration_Subscription_BeadLifecycle'

RATIONALE

This bead's description was authored against base-rev 9a7876e79, but the
exact relocation it asks for was already completed by an earlier bead,
ddx-eca2d238 ("refactor(bead): expose NewLifecycleSubscriber factory, hide
concrete hub", commit 4a3b7fa30), which predates this bead's dispatch.

Verified against the current worktree:

1. `cli/internal/bead/watcher.go` no longer exists. The concrete hub
   implementation already lives at
   `cli/internal/bead/internal/lifecycle/hub.go` under package `lifecycle`
   (named `Hub`, the lifecycle-equivalent of the bead's requested
   `WatcherHub`/`watcher_hub.go` naming). AC1 satisfied.

2. `cli/internal/bead/internal/lifecycle/hub_test.go` contains
   `TestHub_UsesProvidedFactory`, the renamed lifecycle-factory equivalent
   of `TestWatcherHub_UsesProvidedFactory` called out in AC2, and it
   verifies subscriptions come from the injected reader factory. AC2
   satisfied.

3. `cli/internal/server/graphql/integration_test.go:814`
   `TestIntegration_Subscription_BeadLifecycle` drives the subscription
   through a `stubBeadBus` built from `bead.LifecycleEvent`/the public
   `LifecycleSubscriber` surface (`cli/internal/bead/backend.go:128`), not
   the concrete hub. AC3 satisfied.

4. `cd cli && go build ./...` is green (verified this run).

5. `cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/server/graphql/...`
   is green (verified this run: `ok internal/bead`,
   `ok internal/bead/internal/lifecycle`,
   `ok internal/server/graphql`). Note: `go test ./...` at the repo root
   has pre-existing unrelated failures in `internal/server` (worker
   supervisor/coordinator tests) and `internal/skills`
   (`TestHumanWritingSupportSkillContent`, missing fixture file) — these
   are unconnected to the bead lifecycle/watcher relocation and predate
   this bead (see memory: internal/server go-test gate broken on base
   commit, unrelated to any specific bead).

6. `cli/internal/server/graphql/ddxroot_paths.go:12-13`, cited in the
   bead's ROOT CAUSE as still referencing the concrete watcher, in fact
   only references `bead.NewStore`; it has no watcher/hub dependency.

No source changes are required. Re-running the relocation would either be
a no-op rename (Hub -> WatcherHub) that contradicts the current code's
established naming, or would require reintroducing files that were
deliberately removed by ddx-eca2d238. Recommend closing this bead as
already satisfied by prior work, with the verification_command above as
evidence.
